case_title: QUIK-STOR CONTAINER STORAGE CO. & DRINKING WATER - VS. TJ'S OF NEVADA INC C/O G & J EXPRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY QUIK-STOR CONTAINER STORAGE CO. & DRINKING WATER - OF AMERICA INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TJ'S OF NEVADA INC C/O G & J EXPRESS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$270.00) SERVED SEP-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TJ'S OF NEVADA INC C/O G & J EXPRESS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIK-STOR CONTAINER STORAGE CO. & DRINKING WATER - OF AMERICA INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TJ'S OF NEVADA INC C/O G & J EXPRESS INC. $4,599.04 PRINCIPAL, $311.22 INTEREST, $320.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,230.26, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
